---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in DRIP
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

A minimal example is worth ten paragraphs. If you can, paste the exact command(s) and the file content (or a stand-in).

## Expected behavior

What you thought DRIP would do.

## Actual behavior

What it did instead. Include the full output, not a summary.

## `drip --version` output

```
$ drip --version
drip x.y.z
```

## Environment

- OS:                  <!-- e.g. macOS 14.4 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 (WSL2) -->
- Architecture:        <!-- x86_64 / aarch64 -->
- Agent:               <!-- Claude Code 1.x / Codex CLI 0.x / Gemini CLI / none -->
- Install method:      <!-- install.sh / cargo install / from source -->

## Additional context

Relevant logs, screenshots, related issues. Anything that helped you narrow it down.
